title: The Curious Case of Dolphin Bay
original_title: The Curious Case of Dolphin Bay
overview: It follows 15-year old Quinn Perkins, who will be spending the summer working as an intern with her best friend Daniela. Mysterious events start to occur, and they assume that they are being haunted by local legend Everly Fallow.
